title: Embark on an Unforgettable Easter Adventure
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - As Easter approaches, we're thrilled to invite all South Africans on an extraordinary journey filled with adventure, culture, and mouthwatering cuisine! Get ready to experience Easter like never before with our Sho't Left Easter Campaign: Seat At The Table.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - As Easter approaches, we're thrilled to invite all South Africans on an extraordinary journey filled with adventure, culture, and mouthwatering cuisine! Get ready to experience Easter like never before with our Sho't Left Easter Campaign: Seat At The Table."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"At the heart of our campaign lies the spirit of Easter – a time for family, faith, and exploration. We understand that travel during this holiday can seem out of reach for many. That's why we're bringing the thrill of Easter experiences directly to you, no matter where you are in the country!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sho’t Left encourages South Africans to venture out and create their Easter memories anywhere this holiday season, breaking away from the confines of their home. Recognising the significance of tables in fostering connection and community, we invite you to set yours up in any of the many truly unique and accessible locations across our diverse nation. With nine provinces to explore, Mzansi travellers have a plethora of affordable and unforgettable experiences to choose from.","html":"Sho’t Left encourages South Africans to venture out and create their Easter memories anywhere this holiday season, breaking away from the confines of their home. Recognising the significance of tables in fostering connection and community, we invite you to set yours up in any of the many truly unique and accessible locations across our diverse nation. With nine provinces to explore, Mzansi travellers have a plethora of affordable and unforgettable experiences to choose from."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The #SeatAtTheTable campaign encourages South Africans to redefine their Easter experience by taking their meals on the road. Whether nestled in the heart of bustling cities or surrounded by the serene beauty of nature, there's a table waiting for every family and friend group across Mzansi.","html":"The #SeatAtTheTable campaign encourages South Africans to redefine their Easter experience by taking their meals on the road. Whether nestled in the heart of bustling cities or surrounded by the serene beauty of nature, there's a table waiting for every family and friend group across Mzansi."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With accessibility and affordability at the forefront, Sho't Left hosts a variety of day travel deals and sightseeing opportunities on their platform. From the picturesque landscapes of Mpumalanga to the vibrant culture of KwaZulu-Natal, there's a destination to suit every taste and preference for every type of family.","html":"With accessibility and affordability at the forefront, Sho't Left hosts a variety of day travel deals and sightseeing opportunities on their platform. From the picturesque landscapes of Mpumalanga to the vibrant culture of KwaZulu-Natal, there's a destination to suit every taste and preference for every type of family."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"South Africans deserve to enjoy remarkable experiences and shotleft.co.za is your trusted companion in discovering these experiences, even within arm's reach. Need help figuring out where to begin? Follow Sho't Left's social media pages on Facebook or Instagram to engage in various activities designed to immerse you in a truly South African way, igniting your passion to take your table on the road and set it anywhere in Mzansi. This Easter, Sho't Left has content curated to inspire and inform; here's what you can expect:","html":"South Africans deserve to enjoy remarkable experiences and shotleft.co.za is your trusted companion in discovering these experiences, even within arm's reach. Need help figuring out where to begin? Follow Sho't Left's social media pages on Facebook or Instagram to engage in various activities designed to immerse you in a truly South African way, igniting your passion to take your table on the road and set it anywhere in Mzansi. This Easter, Sho't Left has content curated to inspire and inform; here's what you can expect:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Follow ordinary South Africans and their escapades on Sho't Left's digital platforms and uncover exciting travel deals for your Easter escape. Local Flavour Showcase: Tantalise your taste buds with the diverse flavours of Mzansi. From bustling street food scenes to hidden culinary gems in local markets, explore the food delights awaiting travellers during their Sho't Left getaways. Engage with Sho't Left's social media platforms to discover new culinary destinations and plan your Easter feast.","html":"Follow ordinary South Africans and their escapades on Sho't Left's digital platforms and uncover exciting travel deals for your Easter escape. Local Flavour Showcase: Tantalise your taste buds with the diverse flavours of Mzansi. From bustling street food scenes to hidden culinary gems in local markets, explore the food delights awaiting travellers during their Sho't Left getaways. Engage with Sho't Left's social media platforms to discover new culinary destinations and plan your Easter feast."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"#TravelWise: As you travel through Mzansi, remember to prioritise safety and responsible travel practices. Sho’t Left will share essential travel tips and advice for a safe and enjoyable Easter getaway. From updating your navigation tools to preparing for varying weather conditions, ensure your personal safety while exploring South Africa's breathtaking landscapes.","html":"#TravelWise: As you travel through Mzansi, remember to prioritise safety and responsible travel practices. Sho’t Left will share essential travel tips and advice for a safe and enjoyable Easter getaway. From updating your navigation tools to preparing for varying weather conditions, ensure your personal safety while exploring South Africa's breathtaking landscapes."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Prepare to chase adventure, celebrate diversity, and create lasting memories this Easter! Stay tuned for more details and prepare to embark on the ultimate Sho't Left journey. For more exciting activities and Sho’t Left deals, visit www.shotleft.co.za. After all, it's your country – enjoy it cause nothing’s more fun than a Sho't Left.","html":"Prepare to chase adventure, celebrate diversity, and create lasting memories this Easter! Stay tuned for more details and prepare to embark on the ultimate Sho't Left journey. For more exciting activities and Sho’t Left deals, visit www.shotleft.co.za. After all, it's your country – enjoy it cause nothing’s more fun than a Sho't Left."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
